summary.ko: 환승 없이 베뉴비안 코앞 신풍역까지 한 번에 도착합니다. 짐칸이 있어 캐리어를 들고 타기 편해요.
summary.en: One seat all the way to Sinpung Station — right at the venue. Luggage hold under the bus.
summary.de: Eine Sitzplatz-Verbindung direkt bis zur Sinpung-Station — am Veranstaltungsort. Gepäckfach unter dem Bus.

summary.ko: 영등포구는 정액 ₩55,000입니다. 영문 가능 기사가 운전하고 통행료가 포함되어 있어 편하게 이용할 수 있어요.
summary.en: Flat ₩55,000 to Yeongdeungpo (Zone A). English-speaking driver, all tolls included — no surprises.
summary.de: Pauschal 55.000 ₩ nach Yeongdeungpo (Zone A). Englischsprachiger Fahrer, Mautgebühren inklusive — keine Überraschungen.

summary.ko: 공항철도 일반열차로 서울역까지 → 1호선 신도림 → 2호선 대림 → 7호선 신풍역. 가장 저렴하지만 환승이 세 번입니다.
summary.en: AREX (all-stop) → Seoul Station → Line 1 to Sindorim → Line 2 to Daerim → Line 7 to Sinpung. Cheapest, but three transfers.
summary.de: AREX (alle Stationen) → Seoul Station → Linie 1 nach Sindorim → Linie 2 nach Daerim → Linie 7 nach Sinpung. Am günstigsten, aber drei Umstiege.

distance.en: About 10 min by subway from Sinpung (Line 7 → Line 2)
distance.de: ca. 10 min mit der U-Bahn von Sinpung (Linie 7 → Linie 2)

note.ko: 윈덤 브랜드 4성 호텔. 영문 응대 가능, 비즈니스 센터·피트니스 시설 보유.
note.en: Wyndham brand. English-speaking front desk, business center, fitness.

distance.en: About 10 min by subway from Sinpung (near Mullae Stn, Line 2)
distance.de: ca. 10 min mit der U-Bahn von Sinpung (Mullae-Station, Linie 2)

note.ko: 메리어트 브랜드 4성 호텔. 무료 조식과 Wi-Fi, 모던한 객실.
note.en: Marriott brand. Free breakfast, free Wi-Fi, contemporary rooms.
note.de: Marriott-Marke. Frühstück und WLAN inklusive, moderne Zimmer.

hotels.name: Courtyard by Marriott Seoul Times Square

distance.ko: 신풍역에서 약 1km. 영등포역(1호선) 도보 5분, 타임스퀘어몰과 직결.
distance.en: About 1 km from Sinpung. 5-min walk from Yeongdeungpo Stn (Line 1). Connected to Times Square Mall.
distance.de: ca. 1 km von Sinpung. 5 Minuten zu Fuß von Yeongdeungpo (Linie 1). Direkt mit Times Square Mall verbunden.

note.ko: 메리어트 브랜드 4성 호텔. 쇼핑·식당가가 직결되어 외국인 친화적.
note.en: Marriott brand. Mall and dining attached — easy for international guests.
note.de: Marriott-Marke. Direkt am Einkaufszentrum mit Restaurants — bequem für internationale Gäste.

distance.en: About 10–15 min by subway from Sinpung. 5-min walk from Yeongdeungpo Stn (Line 1).
distance.de: ca. 10–15 min mit der U-Bahn von Sinpung. 5 Minuten zu Fuß von Yeongdeungpo (Linie 1).

note.ko: 일본계 비즈니스호텔 체인. 무료 조식 제공, 가성비 좋음.
note.en: Reliable Japanese business-hotel chain. Free breakfast, great value.
note.de: Zuverlässige japanische Business-Hotel-Kette. Frühstück inklusive, gutes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis.
